author: Binu N.
pros: Easy to use, Time and Holiday real time tracking and easy payroll information
cons: warning can be given if someone is working more than scheduled

description: Overall bizimply is a very good software, without which the day to day running of our store would be much more complex
author: Sophie C.
pros: I like how simple it is to assign shifts using the preset shift lengths which are unique to our store
cons: I think that staff should be able to request holidays through this software as it would make it much easier to assign and sort rotas

review_title: You have cancelled my account before my paid date of the 15th Novemeber!!
author: Jennine J.
pros: Schedule is very visual otherwise the rest of the software is rather dated compared to Breathe
cons: Customer service is questionable. Very unhappy that you have deleted my account before the end date of the 15th November 2021.

description: other than the drop in the connection on the product in the store I have no fear using this product and would highly recommended to any other company
author: Jonathan H.
pros: To be able to access the Bizimply product from the app is a real plus I must say. I have had a few times I needed to adjust the a schedule or two on the go
cons: The issue I have is that there is a constant drop on the app on the device we are using. it does not move from the premise and is always on the WiFi, but the Bizimply app will sometimes not work for an hour or so to connect to the network
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bizimply is a must for our busy business
description: Before we had Bizimply our system was very manual, wages day took hours gathering all the information, now wages day takes 1-2 hours.
author: sharon M.
pros: Easy to use, various locations and over 120 employees all linked together is vital for the day to day running of our business
cons: The format of the time sheet changed recently and this new format is not compatable to our payroll sheet, it would have been nice to have the option to stay with the old format

description: Good, reliable, intuitive labour cost management plus some other really useful features.
author: James B.
pros: Its reliability and simplicity of use. Labour is our biggest controllable cost so it's critical that we have the tools to manage it effectively.
cons: Tax rates can be difficult ... but it's hard to design and operate a platform that takes in all these variables across different entities in different countries I guess.

description: it is an exceptional product and i feel like i couldn't now go and use a different product after using this for 2+ years
author: Rhys M.
pros: the best part of this software is the ease of use for scheduling, holidays and sickness, along with the quick access on mobile apps.
cons: would like to be able to add in personal HR products

description: Over all it's and easy software and does what it says on the tin
author: Laura H.
pros: It's easy to use and user friendly. I like that the scheduling has a colour system and is easy to track who is where.
cons: It's a bit basic with certain things - for example holiday requests and staff being able to see who is work.

description: Good positive experience only issue I have is response times from support. Email and chat feature are too slow. I would prefer a quick phone call to get instant resolution.
author: Tadhg L.
pros: The scheduling, time clock, holiday tracking etc are excellent features. Happy the system has saved us time and made our schedule of easier. We now have accurate payroll as a result.
cons: Support is slow when I’m on the system I need instant support. Often I have needed support but it can take anywhere from 5 to 20 minutes to get a response or longer. By this time I have moved off the task and onto something else. Phone support would be a great bonus.

review_title: What did we do without it
description: Amazing programme and with continuous development it has saved us money and made a mundane part of our Operation that little more easier and interactive
author: Darioush S.
pros: Bizimply acts as our full HR Management. We can track attendance, holidays, training and forecasts. Its a great all in one programme and very user friendly.
cons: Theres nothing that I least like. I think all the functions are fantastic

description: Fantastic experience from initially enquiry, demonstration, trial/testing through to onboarding and implementation.
author: Simon C.
pros: Ease of use, adaptability, support and service.
cons: Few tweaks to add in available overtime/cover shifts would be good.

author: Ciarán C.
pros: Bizimply helps streamline everything to do with managing employees time at work and off work. Real-time scheduling and remote access help us respond to staffing issues as they arise even when were not on site. The employee mobile app helps employees know exactly when they are working with no messing about with paper rosters or text messages
cons: Very well rounded software. Although the data sharing capability needs refining

description: it is just fantastic overall i just loved it
author: Naveed W.
pros: i like features which i can use to make roaster for next week
cons: everything is fine but may be you guys can make some changes it will make our lofe more easy like some featuers for time cards and more other stuff

author: Andrew M.
pros: Exceptionally easy to use, never an issue
cons: Not applicable, can’t think of a feature to mention

author: Jacqueline M.
pros: Staff find it easy to use easy for doing rotas and keeping staff informed
cons: Can play up on loading sometimes, should be more settings for publishing rotas

description: Bizimply is user friendly software which we are using on daily basis on many levels. Wouldn't change it for anything else. All our employees found it easy to use and app in phone is very simple and helpful.
author: Tonya K.
pros: I adore the simplicity of Bizimply. It's so easy to use and it plays such an important role in our office.
cons: Can't say anything negative, but if I would have to say one thing, it's the color scheme.

author: susan L.
pros: Employee time recording clocking functionality essential for the daily and weekly operations of the business and payroll.
cons: I find it has gotten slower the more functionality it gets, when you adjust hours on the schedule it is noticeably slower than it was.

author: Daniel E.
pros: clock in reports, ability to track info as a store
cons: nothing to dislike works well with android and ios

author: Ross H.
pros: It's simply just easy to use and takes about 5 hours off my week doing rotas and trying to keep ontop of staff. Time off request function is a godsend
cons: Holiday days sometimes don't show up properly. If a member of staff books a whole week off it sometimes doesn't show the last 2 days of the time off request on the schedule
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Declan D.
pros: Ease of use of the software to record employee attendance
cons: Maybe add a feature where employees can upload their training records

author: Paige K.
pros: its really simple to use, straight foward
cons: i havent found anything i least like about this software

description: Very good overall so far, i am a new user
author: Melissa M.
pros: How fast the help was received took only a few minutes for someone to answer my query
cons: n/a

author: Emilie N.
pros: The fact that as an HR/admin all the information of all the various location are accessible in 1 click. most of all I love the fact the tool is in constant development, and always get new features that are actually really useful. Bizimply is not only anymore the tool we use for attendance and scheduling, but helps to manage employees, employee administration and business decision making,

author: Jake M.
pros: Mobile app to keep track of work hours is very helpful
cons: There is nothing that I don’t find easy to use for what I need to use bizimply for

description: Really handy software to manage staff and business.
author: Uday P.
pros: Time tracking, clock in n out, holiday, schedule, time off, holiday request etc
cons: None at all so far as it does almost everything
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
